understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level: move and/or switch between selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, which triggers WIN for the level and ultimately for the whole run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_* actions to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; moves can fail if blocked by walls, boundaries, or other objects, though the movement.{direction}_blocked flag is only a hint and not a guarantee. Some adjacent objects (blocks) can be pushed if directly next to the selected piece in the movement direction and space/behavior allows the push. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; CLICK with an exact object pixel position [x,y] switches control to the selectable at that coordinate (if present/valid), letting you position multiple pieces onto goals simultaneously within a limited step budget.
